chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ الْحُسَيْنِ (عليه السلام) مَعَ يَزِيدَ
chapter_title.en: Hadith of Ali Bin Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> with Yazeed<sup>la</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 237)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 237)

parts.text: ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍعَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ سَالِمٍ

text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) إِنَّ مِمَّنْ يَنْتَحِلُ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ لَيَكْذِبُ حَتَّى إِنَّ الشَّيْطَانَ لَيَحْتَاجُ إِلَى كَذِبِهِ.

en.hubeali: H 14810 – Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hashaam Bin Saalim who said:
Abu Abdullahasws said: ‘Whosoever (other than usasws) claims to posses this Command (Wilayah), he has lied to the extent that the Satanla would be needy of his lie’.
en.sarwar: 363. Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hashaam Bin Saalim who said: Abu Abdullah (a.s.) said: ‘Whosoever (other than us (a.s.)) claims to posses this Command (Wilayah), he has lied to the extent that the Satan (la) would be needy of his lie’.
